payload.name: [E1-S1.1] Decisione persistenza litres su daily_production
payload.description_html:
Goal

Decidere se i litri di output (eu_prod_litres / plus_prod_litres) restano calcolati on-the-fly nella materialized view oppure persistiti come colonne fisiche su daily_production per audit immutabile (decisione Day 1).

Acceptance criteria

  • Decisione tracciata in repo (commit message o docs/notes/)
  • Se "persistere" → migration 0007 pronta come follow-up
  • Se "MV-only" → nessuna migration, MV ricomputate ad ogni refresh

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Verificare presenza eu_prod_litres / plus_prod_litres in mv_mass_balance_daily via \d+ mv_mass_balance_daily
  • T2 Audit stakeholder DfT su accettabilità "computed view" vs "physical column" per ispezione
  • T3 Documentare scelta

Risks/notes

Bloccato da decisione D2 (Crown Oil + DfT preference). Cross-ref docs/blueprint-activities.md E1 S1.1.

Depends on

Nessuna (decisione root).

payload.name: [E1-S1.2] Setup WeasyPrint runtime + template base in container backend
payload.description_html:
Goal

Installare WeasyPrint e dipendenze sistema (cairo/pango/gdk-pixbuf) nel container dft-back per abilitare PDF rendering. Prerequisito hard per tutto E1.

Acceptance criteria

  • weasyprint==<latest stable> aggiunto a backend/requirements.txt
  • apt-get install libpango-1.0-0 libpangoft2-1.0-0 libcairo2 libgdk-pixbuf2.0-0 in backend/Dockerfile
  • docker compose build backend succede senza errori
  • Smoke test: python -c "from weasyprint import HTML; HTML(string='<h1>ok</h1>').write_pdf('/tmp/x.pdf')" esegue dentro container

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Patch Dockerfile (system deps)
  • T2 Patch requirements.txt
  • T3 Verificare versione python-jose / pydantic non rotta da install
  • T4 Fallback documentato a reportlab se WeasyPrint fallisce setup

Risks/notes

Risk-high: dipendenze sistema mancanti possono bloccare E1 Day 1. Cross-ref docs/blueprint-activities.md E1 S1.2.

Depends on

Nessuna.

payload.name: [E1-S1.3] Service pdf_renderer + hash side-car SHA-256
payload.description_html:
Goal

Creare service condiviso per rendering PDF audit-grade con hash crittografico side-car, riusabile per Annex A, Annex D, production logs e (futuro) verifier bundle.

Acceptance criteria

  • backend/app/services/pdf_renderer.py con render_pdf(template_name, context) -> bytes
  • hash_pdf(pdf_bytes) -> str (SHA-256 hex digest)
  • Template Jinja base in backend/app/templates/reports/mass_balance.html con header firma, footer hash, paginazione mese, tabella giorni + aggregato mensile + closing stock
  • Unit test su sample

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Creare struttura templates/reports/
  • T2 Design template HTML con CSS print-friendly (page-break, header/footer)
  • T3 Helper hash_pdf con hashlib.sha256
  • T4 Unit test su sample

Risks/notes

Risk-medium: template scope creep. Cross-ref docs/blueprint-activities.md E1 S1.3.

Depends on

E1-S1.2 (WeasyPrint runtime).

payload.name: [E1-S1.4] Endpoint /reports/mass-balance/export PDF
payload.description_html:
Goal

Espone endpoint REST per generare PDF mass-balance mensile con hash header, integrato con audit_log.

Acceptance criteria

  • GET /reports/mass-balance/export?month=YYYY-MM&format=pdf ritorna Response(media_type='application/pdf')
  • Header X-Content-SHA256: <hex>
  • Richiede Bearer auth
  • Usa mv_mass_balance_daily filtrata + mv_mass_balance_monthly aggregata
  • 400 se mese non valido
  • Audit log entry REPORT_EXPORT

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Nuovo handler in backend/app/routers/reports.py
  • T2 Query MV daily filtered + MV monthly aggregated
  • T3 Chiamata pdf_renderer.render_pdf + hash_pdf
  • T4 Audit log entry REPORT_EXPORT su audit_log
  • T5 Test smoke

Risks/notes

Files: backend/app/routers/reports.py, backend/app/services/pdf_renderer.py.

Depends on

E1-S1.3 (pdf_renderer service).

payload.name: [E1-S1.5] Generazione Annex A v1 Gennaio 2025
payload.description_html:
Goal

Generare prima versione del PDF mass-balance Gen 2025 da includere nel bundle RTFO-310125.

Acceptance criteria

  • File bundle_RTFO-310125/02_mass_balance_january_2025_v1.pdf + .sha256 generato via endpoint S1.4
  • Closure −10,05% leggibile
  • Carry-over 339.865 kg dichiarato in footnote

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Chiamata curl autenticata all'endpoint
  • T2 Verifica hash
  • T3 Review visivo team ingest

Risks/notes

Cross-ref docs/blueprint-activities.md E1 S1.5.

Depends on

E1-S1.4 (endpoint PDF).

payload.name: [E1-S1.6] Hardening template + Annex A v2
payload.description_html:
Goal

Stabilizzare template PDF dopo feedback v1 e rigenerare Annex A v2 con hash aggiornato.

Acceptance criteria

  • Template stabile, paginazione mese OK
  • Header firma OisteBio
  • Footer hash + page n/N
  • Font deterministico
  • Rigenera v2 + hash; review OisteBio

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Fix bug visivi v1
  • T2 Commit template templates/reports/mass_balance.html
  • T3 Rigenera bundle file v2

Depends on

E1-S1.5 (v1).

payload.name: [E1-S1.7] Migration 0006 supplier rectification Gennaio 2025
payload.description_html:
Goal

Riclassificare fornitori Gennaio 2025 (mapping a Litoplas/Biowaste/Esenttia) tramite soft-delete + UPDATE, preservando audit trail e closure mass-balance.

Acceptance criteria

  • Riclassificazione fornitori Gen 2025 applicata via UPDATE (mai DELETE)
  • Soft-delete sui supplier_id mal classificati con deleted_at + note "DfT investigation reclassification 2026-05"
  • Ogni riga daily_input riallineata logga in audit_log con old_values/new_values
  • Query closure mass-balance pre/post: delta ≤ 0.01% kg

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Mapping definitivo fornitori (atteso D3 da OisteBio)
  • T2 File backend/alembic/versions/0006_supplier_rectification_jan2025.py
  • T3 Transaction wrap che popola audit_log per ogni UPDATE
  • T4 Dry-run su DB locale + diff input_kg/day pre/post
  • T5 Apply prod con backup

Risks/notes

Risk-high: delta closure > 0.01% → rollback immediato. Bloccato da D3.

Depends on

Nessuna (eseguibile in parallelo a chain PDF), ma decisione D3 mapping fornitori richiesta Day 1-2.

payload.name: [E1-S1.8] Annex D closing stock 339.865 kg PDF
payload.description_html:
Goal

Generare il documento PDF mandatorio Annex D che spiega lo stock di chiusura end-Jan 2025 e giustifica la closure apparente −10,05%.

Acceptance criteria

  • PDF 07_stock_carryover_explanation.pdf con composizione 17 K-only rows JANUARY2025 (righe 48, 78, 94, 108, 138, 194, 223, 228-233, 267, 283, 314, 330)
  • Dichiarazione "fisicamente disponibile in facility OisteBio"
  • Riferimento record interno aziendale
  • Firma OisteBio scansionata
  • Hash SHA-256 side-car

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Template Jinja dedicato in backend/app/templates/reports/stock_carryover.html
  • T2 Dati statici da memoria progetto (project_jan_feb_stock_carryover.md)
  • T3 Rendering via stessa pdf_renderer

Depends on

E1-S1.3 (pdf_renderer).

payload.name: [E1-S1.9] Endpoint CSV /admin/audit-log?format=csv
payload.description_html:
Goal

Aggiungere export CSV streamato all'endpoint audit-log per inclusione nel bundle (file 06_audit_trail_export_january_2025.csv).

Acceptance criteria

  • GET /admin/audit-log accetta param format=csv (default json)
  • Con format=csv ritorna StreamingResponse(media_type='text/csv') con BOM UTF-8
  • Colonne fisse: id,timestamp,user_email,action,table_name,record_id,old_values,new_values,ip_address
  • Filtri since/until rispettati
  • Richiede AdminUser

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Patch backend/app/routers/admin.py ramo CSV
  • T2 Generator function streamato
  • T3 Escape CSV (RFC4180) per JSONB old/new_values
  • T4 Smoke test export Gen 2025
  • T5 Verifica Excel apre con accenti corretti

Depends on

Nessuna.

payload.name: [E1-S1.10] Production conversion log Gen 2025 PDF
payload.description_html:
Goal

Generare PDF 05_production_conversion_logs_january_2025.pdf che documenta esplicitamente kg→litri conversion per ogni giorno Gen 2025.

Acceptance criteria

  • PDF mostra per ogni giorno Gen 2025: eu_prod_kg, plus_prod_kg, density lookup EU 0.78 / PLUS 0.856, formula litres = kg / density, totale mensile in litri
  • Firma OisteBio + hash side-car

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Template templates/reports/production_conversion.html
  • T2 Query MV daily
  • T3 Rendering pipeline pdf_renderer

Depends on

E1-S1.3 (pdf_renderer).

payload.name: [E1-S1.11] Supply chain diagram PDF
payload.description_html:
Goal

Generare diagramma vettoriale supply chain a 4 layer (origin → collecting point → OisteBio Girardot → Crown Oil UK) per bundle file 01_supply_chain_diagram.pdf.

Acceptance criteria

  • PDF 01_supply_chain_diagram.pdf con quattro layer
  • Origin → collecting point Litoplas/Biowaste/Esenttia → OisteBio Girardot → Crown Oil UK
  • Diagramma vettoriale (Graphviz / mermaid render o SVG statico)
  • Cert ISCC overlay come placeholder dove non disponibili (gap dichiarato)

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Scegliere tool (Graphviz CLI in container backend è opzione semplice)
  • T2 Input dati da supplier mapping post-S1.7
  • T3 Render statico una-tantum, commit nel bundle

Depends on

E1-S1.7 (supplier mapping definitivo).

payload.name: [E1-S1.12] Cover letter Crown Oil + evidence index PDF
payload.description_html:
Goal

Produrre cover letter firmata Crown Oil (00_cover_letter.pdf) e evidence index PDF (09_evidence_index.pdf) con cross-reference docs ↔ punti rigetto DfT.

Acceptance criteria

  • 00_cover_letter.pdf firmato Crown Oil con sezione "Outstanding items" (3 gap residui da §5 di 5wd-plan)
  • 09_evidence_index.pdf cross-reference tabella docs ↔ punti rigetto DfT

Technical breakdown

  • T1 v0 draft Day 1 (Crown Oil)
  • T2 v1 Day 4 review legale
  • T3 v2 Day 5 incorporare evidence definitive
  • T4 FINAL Day 6 firmato
  • T5 Evidence index renderizzato via pdf_renderer + dati statici

Risks/notes

Cross-team: ownership Crown Oil legal + ops, non engineering. Architect ha tenuto monolitica - vedi PM notes per razionale.

Depends on

E1-S1.6 (Annex A v2), E1-S1.7 (supplier mapping), E1-S1.8 (Annex D).

payload.name: [E1-S1.13] PDF 03_iscc_pos_status.pdf
payload.description_html:
Goal

Documentare lo stato della richiesta PoS ISCC retroattiva inviata al certifier Colombia Day 1, da includere come gap dichiarato nel bundle.

Acceptance criteria

  • PDF documenta richiesta retroattiva inviata Day 1
  • Risposta certifier (se ricevuta entro Day 6)
  • Impegno consegna post-acceptance

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Raccogliere timestamp email
  • T2 Template Jinja
  • T3 Firma OisteBio

Depends on

E1-S1.3 (pdf_renderer).

payload.name: [E1-S1.14] Feedstock provider authorisations folder + status
payload.description_html:
Goal

Assemblare la cartella 04_feedstock_provider_authorisations/ con copie ANLA/Min.Ambiente per Litoplas/Biowaste/Esenttia + nota stato legalizzazione consolare.

Acceptance criteria

  • Cartella 04_feedstock_provider_authorisations/ con PDF per Litoplas/Biowaste/Esenttia (copie ANLA/Min.Ambiente non legalizzate)
  • _status_legalisation.pdf con ETA legalizzazione consolare

Technical breakdown

  • T1 OisteBio fornisce copie
  • T2 Nota stato legalizzazione

Depends on

Nessuna (asincrono OisteBio).

payload.name: [E1-S1.15] Pre-audit interno bundle Day 4
payload.description_html:
Goal

Checklist walk-through del bundle assemblato a Day 4 con team ingest + OisteBio + Crown Oil per identificare gap residui prima del fix di Day 5.

Acceptance criteria

  • Checklist firmata team ingest + OisteBio + Crown Oil
  • Verifica completezza Annex A/B/C/D + production log + audit CSV
  • Gap emersi listati per Day 5 fix

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Checklist template
  • T2 Walk-through bundle
  • T3 Lista azioni Day 5

Depends on

Tutti i deliverable PDF (S1.5, S1.8, S1.9, S1.10, S1.11, S1.13, S1.14).

payload.name: [E1-S1.16] Snapshot crittografico DB Day 5 + Day 6
payload.description_html:
Goal

Produrre snapshot DB con hash per evidence integrity, sia preliminare (Day 5) sia FINAL (Day 6 pre-submission).

Acceptance criteria

  • db_snapshot_2026-05-19.sql.gz + .sha256 (Day 5 preliminare)
  • db_snapshot_2026-05-20.sql.gz + .sha256 (Day 6 FINAL)
  • Comando: pg_dump dft | gzip | tee snapshot.sql.gz | sha256sum > snapshot.sha256

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Script scripts/snapshot_db.sh con timestamp + hash
  • T2 Esecuzione dentro container dft-back
  • T3 Storage offline

Risks/notes

Pre-flight df -h obbligatorio per evitare fallimento per spazio disco.

Depends on

E1-S1.7 (rectification applied prima del snapshot FINAL).

payload.name: [E1-S1.17] Audit interno Day 6 + Annex A FINAL
payload.description_html:
Goal

Audit interno definitivo del bundle Day 6 con cross-reference completo e rigenerazione Annex A FINAL con hash definitivo per evidence index.

Acceptance criteria

  • Cross-reference ogni kg Gennaio in mass-balance ↔ daily_input ↔ supplier ↔ PoS o gap dichiarato
  • Checklist firmata
  • Annex A rigenerato come 02_mass_balance_january_2025_FINAL.pdf con hash FINAL elencato in evidence index

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Walkthrough Crown Oil + OisteBio + team ingest
  • T2 Fix gap
  • T3 Rigenera Annex A
  • T4 Update evidence index con hash definitivo
  • T5 Cover letter cita hash manifest

Depends on

E1-S1.15 (pre-audit Day 4 gap list).

payload.name: [E1-S1.18] Submission ROS Day 7 + notifica DfT
payload.description_html:
Goal

Upload finale del bundle RTFO-310125 su ROS + notifica formale a DfT contact entro 21 mag 2026 23:59 UK.

Acceptance criteria

  • Verifica integrità bundle (file presenti, hash verificati, dimensioni)
  • Telefonata cortesia DfT contact (mattina)
  • Upload su ROS (pomeriggio)
  • Email notifica formale al contact DfT con lista allegati + hash file principale (EOD)

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Checklist integrità
  • T2 Chiamata
  • T3 Upload
  • T4 Email

Risks/notes

Risk-high: slittamento Day 6 → buffer mattina Day 7. Slittamento Day 7 = pathway 2025 Gen chiusa.

Depends on

E1-S1.12 (cover letter FINAL), E1-S1.16 (snapshot FINAL), E1-S1.17 (Annex A FINAL).

payload.name: [E2-S2.1] Setup shadcn/ui + base UI primitives
payload.description_html:
Goal

Verifica completezza dei componenti shadcn/ui in landing/src/components/ui/ e integra primitives mancanti.

Acceptance criteria

  • Componenti base in landing/src/components/ui/: button, input, label, form, card, table, dialog, dropdown-menu, select, toast, badge
  • Design tokens (var(--bg), var(--ink)) preservati

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Audit presenza tutti i primitives
  • T2 Integrare quelli mancanti (form, toast da check)
  • T3 Smoke test render su pagina dev

Risks/notes

Codebase in flight: verificare contro spec docs/sprint-3-frontend.md S3-1.

Depends on

Nessuna.

payload.name: [E2-S2.2] API client lib + tipi backend
payload.description_html:
Goal

Verifica esistenza e completezza del typed fetch wrapper landing/src/lib/api.ts e dei tipi generati da OpenAPI.

Acceptance criteria

  • landing/src/lib/api.ts typed fetch wrapper
  • Tipi generati da /openapi.json via openapi-typescript
  • apiGet/apiPost/apiPatch/apiDelete
  • ApiError(status, code, detail) tipizzato
  • Cookie reading server-only

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Verifica lib/api.ts esiste
  • T2 Verifica generazione tipi
  • T3 Helper auth injection

Depends on

Nessuna.

payload.name: [E2-S2.3] Auth flow login/logout (server actions)
payload.description_html:
Goal

Verifica conformità del flow /login con server actions e cookie httpOnly secondo spec.

Acceptance criteria

  • /login con server actions (loginAction/logoutAction in src/lib/auth.ts)
  • Cookie dft_session httpOnly + Secure(prod) + SameSite=Lax + Max-Age 8h
  • Redirect /app su login, / su logout

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Verifica landing/src/app/login/ con login-form.tsx + page.tsx
  • T2 Verifica conformità AC
  • T3 Test E2E manuale login admin@dft-project.com

Depends on

E2-S2.2 (api client).

payload.name: [E2-S2.4] Middleware route protection
payload.description_html:
Goal

Verifica conformità middleware route protection con matcher /app/:path* e jose JWT verify.

Acceptance criteria

  • landing/src/middleware.ts matcher /app/:path*
  • JWT verify via jose
  • Redirect /login?next=${pathname} se mancante/invalido/scaduto
  • Cookie cleared se scaduto

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Verifica matcher
  • T2 Verifica jose.jwtVerify
  • T3 Verifica path next preservation

Risks/notes

Risk: JWT_SECRET disallineato dev/prod → login rotto. Documentare in .env.example.

Depends on

E2-S2.3 (auth flow).

payload.name: [E2-S2.5] Dashboard layout shell
payload.description_html:
Goal

Verifica conformità del layout (app)/layout.tsx con sidebar fissa + topbar + responsive collassabile.

Acceptance criteria

  • Nav Dashboard/Reports/Anagrafiche
  • Sidebar collassabile mobile (Radix sheet)
  • User dropdown + logout

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Verifica landing/src/app/app/layout.tsx
  • T2 Verifica conformità spec
  • T3 Smoke test navigation

Depends on

E2-S2.4 (middleware).

payload.description_html:

Verifica server component dashboard home con 4 KPI cards + sparkline Recharts.

Acceptance criteria

  • 4 KPI cards: Input 30g, Output 30g, Closure %, Alert count

  • Render < 500ms
  • Thousand separator IT

Technical breakdown

Depends on

E2-S2.5 (layout).

Acceptance criteria

  • Date range picker (default 30g)

Technical breakdown

Depends on

E2-S2.5 (layout).

payload.description_html:

payload.name: [E2-S2.10] Anagrafiche read-only viewer
payload.description_html:
Goal

Verifica pagine suppliers/certificates/contracts read-only con TanStack Table + search + detail view.

Acceptance criteria

E2-S2.5 (layout).

payload.name: [E2-S2.11] Sprint 3 DoD verification + deploy smoke test
payload.description_html:
Goal

Verifica DoD Sprint 3 con checklist eseguibile + smoke test deploy prod (post WARN-1 reviewer).

Acceptance criteria (executable checks)

  • POST /api/auth/login admin@dft-project.com → 200 + cookie httpOnly
  • GET /app dashboard → KPI cards rendered + chart input-vs-output presente
  • GET /app/reports/mass-balance → tabella Gen 2025 con totali kg + litres (eu/plus) + colonna C14 visibile
  • GET /app/reports/by-supplier → pie chart + ranking + click "Export CSV" produce file
  • GET /app/reports/closure → semaforo bucket tolleranza + filtro mese
  • GET /app/audit → ultimi 50 eventi audit_log paginati
  • CRUD /app/daily-inputs: create + update + soft-delete → ogni op genera 1 riga audit_log
  • cd landing && pnpm build → exit 0, zero TS errors
  • cd landing && pnpm lint → exit 0, zero warnings
  • PM2 reload oistebio @ 91.98.82.20 → curl https://oistebio.usenexos.com/app/login → 200 con header set-cookie

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Playwright headless script copre check #1-#7 con asserzioni pass/fail
  • T2 pnpm build + pnpm lint locale & CI
  • T3 rsync landing/ → Hetzner + PM2 reload
  • T4 Smoke curl prod su tutte le 7 viste sopra
  • T5 Screenshot bundle in screenshots-jan2025/sprint3-dod/

Risks/notes

Risk-medium: JWT_SECRET drift dev↔prod; bundle size soglia recharts+tanstack. AC riscritti come check eseguibili (reviewer WARN-1 risolto).

Depends on

E2-S2.6, E2-S2.7, E2-S2.8, E2-S2.9, E2-S2.10 (tutte le pagine app).

payload.name: [E3-S3.1] Fetch RTFO List of Feedstocks ufficiale + seed CSV
payload.description_html:
Goal

Scaricare la lista ufficiale DfT dei feedstock RTFO e normalizzarla in CSV inline per seed migration successiva.

Acceptance criteria

  • docs/rtfo-feedstock-list.md con CSV inline (code, name, rtfo_class, double_counting_eligible, source URL DfT, fetch date)
  • ELT presente con rtfo_class=rcf + lcf_designation_status=pending

Technical breakdown

  • T1 WebFetch lista DfT
  • T2 Normalizzare CSV
  • T3 Commit doc

Risks/notes

Lista può cambiare annualmente — versionare seed con fetch date.

Depends on

Nessuna.

payload.name: [E3-S3.2] Migration 0008 feedstocks table
payload.description_html:
Goal

Creare la tabella feedstocks + FK su daily_inputs.feedstock_id + seed RTFO da CSV S3.1.

Acceptance criteria

  • Schema feedstocks creato
  • FK su daily_inputs nullable
  • Seed da CSV S3.1
  • Tutti i daily_input esistenti restano feedstock_id NULL (back-population in S3.3)

Technical breakdown

  • T1 backend/alembic/versions/0008_feedstocks.py
  • T2 backend/app/models/feedstock.py
  • T3 backend/app/schemas/feedstock.py

Depends on

E3-S3.1 (CSV seed).

payload.name: [E3-S3.3] Back-population daily_inputs.feedstock_id ELT
payload.description_html:
Goal

Script che back-popola tutti i daily_input esistenti con feedstock_id = ELT, con audit_log entries.

Acceptance criteria

  • Script scripts/backfill_feedstock_elt.py
  • UPDATE daily_inputs.feedstock_id = (SELECT id FROM feedstocks WHERE code='ELT')
  • Audit_log entries per ogni riga
  • Rollback safe

Technical breakdown

  • T1 Script Python con SQLAlchemy session
  • T2 Audit log batch
  • T3 Dry-run + apply

Risks/notes

Scope corrente ELT-only banale. Futuro feedstock biogenico richiederà logica per riga.

Depends on

E3-S3.2 (feedstocks table).

payload.name: [E3-S3.4] Router /feedstocks CRUD
payload.description_html:
Goal

Endpoint CRUD per feedstocks con pattern come routers/anagrafica.py e audit_log integration.

Acceptance criteria

  • CRUD standard pattern come routers/anagrafica.py
  • admin only per POST/PATCH
  • viewer può GET
  • audit_log integration

Technical breakdown

  • T1 backend/app/routers/feedstocks.py
  • T2 backend/app/main.py (include router)

Depends on

E3-S3.2 (feedstocks table).

payload.name: [E3-S3.5] Migration 0009 ghg_calculations table
payload.description_html:
Goal

Creare tabella ghg_calculations con methodology enum e check constraints sulla soglia GHG saving.

Acceptance criteria

  • Schema creato
  • FK su daily_production nullable
  • Enum ghg_methodology definito
  • Constraint check baseline_fossil_gCO2eq_MJ > 0
  • Constraint ghg_saving_pct = (baseline - ci_total) / baseline * 100

Technical breakdown

  • T1 backend/alembic/versions/0009_ghg_calculations.py
  • T2 backend/app/models/ghg_calculation.py
  • T3 backend/app/schemas/ghg_calculation.py

Depends on

Nessuna (indipendente da chain feedstocks).

payload.name: [E3-S3.6] Router /ghg-calculations upload manuale
payload.description_html:
Goal

Endpoint per upload manuale di GHG calculations con compute saving server-side e advisory 422 sotto soglia.

Acceptance criteria

  • POST /ghg-calculations accetta JSON body (no upload file in Fase 1)
  • Compute ghg_saving_pct server-side
  • Flag threshold_met = ghg_saving_pct ≥ 65
  • Ritorna 422 se sotto soglia con warning (non blocca insert)

Technical breakdown

  • T1 backend/app/routers/ghg_calculations.py
  • T2 Validazione Pydantic
  • T3 Audit log integration

Depends on

E3-S3.5 (ghg_calculations table).

payload.name: [E3-S3.7] Migration 0010 certificate scheme enum
payload.description_html:
Goal

Convertire Certificate.scheme da VARCHAR a enum certificate_scheme data-preserving.

Acceptance criteria

  • Migration data-preserving: UPDATE valori esistenti 'ISCC EU' → 'ISCC_EU', 'ISCC' → 'ISCC_EU', etc
  • ALTER COLUMN type su enum certificate_scheme ∈ {ISCC_EU, ISCC_PLUS, REDcert, REDcert_EU, RSB_EU_RED, RSB_Global, KZR_INiG, _2BSvs, Bonsucro, ...}
  • Rollback path documentato
  • Nessuna riga persa

Technical breakdown

  • T1 backend/alembic/versions/0010_certificate_scheme_enum.py
  • T2 Data UPDATE prima di ALTER
  • T3 Backup pre-apply

Risks/notes

Risk-medium: migrazione su tabella popolata in prod, backup obbligatorio.

Depends on

Nessuna.

  • Valida to_year = year+1
  • Rifiuta double carry-over (no carry-over di carry-over)

  • T2 Validation helper
  • T3 Event emission carried_over
  • T4 Unit test cap 25%

Risks/notes

Risk-high: carry-over mal calcolato → certificati assegnati eccedenti. Test specifici obbligatori.

payload.name: [E1-S1.6b] Migration 0007 persist_production_litres (conditional D2)
payload.description_html:
Goal

Conditional follow-up di E1-S1.1: se D2 = 'persistere litres' aggiungere colonne litres_eu / litres_plus a daily_production come GENERATED ALWAYS via product_densities (migration 0007). Se D2 = 'MV-only' chiudere come Cancelled.

Conditional trigger

Attivare SOLO se E1-S1.1 risolve con esito 'persist'. Altrimenti transitionare a Cancelled state in Plane.

Acceptance criteria

  • backend/alembic/versions/0007_persist_production_litres.py creata
  • ADD COLUMN litres_eu NUMERIC GENERATED ALWAYS AS (eu_prod_kg / 0.78) STORED
  • ADD COLUMN litres_plus NUMERIC GENERATED ALWAYS AS (plus_prod_kg / 0.856) STORED
  • alembic upgrade head → green
  • SELECT su daily_production restituisce litres coerenti con mv_mass_balance_monthly
  • alembic downgrade -1 testato + ripristinato
  • CLAUDE.md regola "MAI scrivere su colonne GENERATED" estesa anche a litres_eu/litres_plus

Technical breakdown

  • T1 alembic revision -m persist_production_litres
  • T2 Add 2 generated columns con cast a product_densities
  • T3 Optional: simplify mv_mass_balance_monthly (rimuovi calcolo runtime)
  • T4 Test su dump Gen 2025 (verify byte-equal output)

Risks/notes

GENERATED STORED + densita immutabile per row. Se cliente modifica product_densities in futuro: storiche restano coerenti con densita all'INSERT (Postgres GENERATED behavior).

Depends on

E1-S1.1 (D2 = persist).

payload.name: [E2-S2.12] Housekeeping doc baseline (CLAUDE.md + agentos-context + BLUEPRINT)
payload.description_html:
Goal

Riallineare doc baseline a stato reale repo post-Sprint 3 (reviewer OBS-2 + OBS-3 + OBS-4 risolti).

Acceptance criteria

  • CLAUDE.md riga 28 "prossima è 000N_" aggiornata a prossimo prefisso reale
  • CLAUDE.md riga 51 "N migration files" coerente con git ls backend/alembic/versions/
  • CLAUDE.md tabella Sprint: Sprint 3 → ✓ COMPLETO (data chiusura)
  • docs/agentos-context.md §3: count migrations + lista files allineata a HEAD
  • docs/agentos-context.md §6: endpoint /daily-inputs + /daily-production al posto di /daily-entries
  • BLUEPRINT.md bumped a v0.2 con schema split daily_input/daily_production
  • Commit chore(docs): rebaseline post-sprint-3

Technical breakdown

  • T1 grep -rn '0009_\|8 migration\|daily_entries\|daily-entries' docs/ CLAUDE.md BLUEPRINT.md
  • T2 Edit CLAUDE.md (3 sezioni: riga 28 + riga 51 + tabella sprint)
  • T3 Edit docs/agentos-context.md §3 + §6
  • T4 Bump BLUEPRINT.md v0.1 → v0.2 con changelog
  • T5 Commit + push

Depends on

E2-S2.11 (Sprint 3 DoD chiuso).
